benefits.description: Tirzepatide superior for appetite suppression and weight loss; Retatrutide useful for water retention management

side_effects.description: Retatrutide at equivalent dose (10mg) provides insufficient appetite suppression - 'smashing cereal at night'
Fasting blood glucose suffered on Retatrutide

protocol_notes: Switched from Tirzepatide to Retatrutide and found it inferior. Currently uses low-dose Retatrutide for water management while maintaining Tirzepatide for weight loss phase. Bodybuilder perspective - prefers Tirzepatide for appetite suppression and body composition during cutting phases.
